# Kivy Webview Widget - Dependencies



[![PyPI](https://img.shields.io/pypi/v/kivy-webview.deps?style=flat-square&label=kivy_webview.deps&color=00C853)](https://pypi.org/project/kivy-webview.deps/)


### ⚙️ Building the Dependencies

> [!IMPORTANT]
> All the commands below assume execution in the current target directory `./deps/`.

#### Step 1: Set Up the Development Environment

- **Download and Set Up MSBuild**:  
  MSBuild is installed with Visual Studio. If not available, it can be downloaded [here](https://visualstudio.microsoft.com/downloads/). Make sure to include the development tools during installation.

- **Open the Developer Command Prompt**:  
  Search for **"Developer Command Prompt for Visual Studio"** in the Start menu and open it. This automatically sets up the necessary environment variables for MSBuild.

- **Verify MSBuild Installation**:  
  In the command prompt, run:  
  ```bash
  msbuild -version
  ```


#### Step 2: Build the Dependencies

> [!IMPORTANT]
> Ensure the use of Python version `3.11.x`, preferably the latest available patch version.

Once the environment is set up, build the dependencies by running the following command:

```bash
python scripts/cef_build_deps.py
```

This command will download and compile the necessary dependencies for the project.

---

### 📦 Testing Building Wheels
   ```bash
   python -m build --wheel
   ```
